session.name: MPI-324 RunPod validation sweep (1.2.0 release gate) — GPU pass DONE for MPI-309 + MPI-282; NEW remote-only re-render storm MPI-326 found (blocker candidate); MPI-300 + MPI-310-uninstall still pending a Pod

goal.original: Validate every RunPod-deferred 1.2.0 card in ONE Pod session so cards can close before release, then get the app release-ready ASAP. MPI-198 deferred.
goal.summary: GPU Pod pass on RTX 2000 (volume 9t3awufudk): MPI-309 (box nodes) and MPI-282 (Krea2 edit) are REMOTE-PROVEN and moved to done; Head Swap remote gen worked (NOT a 1.2 gate — apps stay dev-only in 1.2); MPI-310 describe worked but uninstall/GC + negative-mode are NOT run; MPI-300 Qwen-Edit was NOT tested this session. A NEW steady-state bug MPI-326 was found and fully isolated: while remote-connected, a ~1-3s poll storm remounts the PromptBox so the operations dropdown flashes/auto-closes and per-op sliders snap back mid-drag — controls are unusable on remote. It is 100% remote-driven (delete Pod / go local = clean) and survives a clean restart+reconnect, so it is a genuine design bug, not a connect artifact. Leans 1.2-blocker; user deferred the 1.2-vs-1.3 scope call to next session. A read-only root-cause trace was dispatched; its findings belong on the MPI-326 card.

completed: Deleted the CPU download pod, connected a GPU RTX 2000 on the SAME volume 9t3awufudk.

MPI-309 PROVEN remote + moved to done: on connect the wrapper toasted 'Loading new nodes - restarting the remote engine' (it saw the aaa1d2d lock change and reinstalled the volume node); app_head_swap.json compiled + ran with NO unknown-node rejection; MpiBox crop region followed a live user box-resize; correct head swap saved to gallery; Hyper tier = 4 steps.

MPI-282 PROVEN remote + moved to done: Krea2 t2i/i2i/depth/upscale/masked edit + 2-character edit all clean, no seam, no degrade; accel LoRA (krea2_turbo_distill_r128) resolved (clean output = no silent LoRA miss); backslash subfolder LoRA path worked on Linux. Step count result-verified, not console-counted.
MPI-310 describe-from-gallery worked remotely (weight fetched on-demand).

Carded MPI-325 (Head Swap: allow target/reference box to extend OUTSIDE frame + auto-pad, keep square — surfaced when an edge-adjacent head could not capture full hair without grabbing the neighbour; NOT a v1.2 blocker, apps dev-only).
Carded MPI-326 (remote-only ~1-3s re-render storm; op dropdown + sliders unusable on remote) with full diagnosis + fix-surface candidates.
Repaired a PRE-EXISTING backslash-escaped corrupt line in tasks/MPI-282/events.jsonl (escape-only, no wording change).
pending: VERIFY the MPI-326 fix on a Pod (already IMPLEMENTED this session for 1.2, uncommitted). Fix A edge-guards the sync at shell.js:1370 (if connected AND NOT _wasRemoteConnected); Fix B diff-gates the models:checked emit at modelRegistry.js:218 (module-level _lastEmittedInstalledKey/_driftedKey + early return when unchanged). node --check clean; all reSyncInstalledModels callers swept safe. Remaining: connect a Pod, sit idle, confirm the op dropdown stays open + sliders drag cleanly on remote AND the Pod log no longer POSTs /wrapper/models/status every ~5s; then move MPI-326 to done and commit js/shell.js + js/data/modelRegistry.js.
Finish MPI-300 (Qwen-Edit: tier radio, 2-image combine, the UNTESTED-ANYWHERE 3rd-image chip Input_Image_3, style rack) on a cheap Pod reconnect (transformer staged on volume 9t3awufudk).
Finish MPI-310 (inverse-GC check FIRST, then describe-from-history + negative-mode flip, then uninstall DEAD LAST = 5GB refetch risk).
Move MPI-310 (and MPI-300) to done only on their own remote pass; fill the MPI-324 results table rows.

Then run the release flow. VERSION CHANGE (peer session MPI-327, 2026-07-21): the public target is now 1.1.0, NOT 1.2.0 — the internal 1.1.0 + 1.1.1 never shipped publicly, so this dev branch ships publicly as 1.1.0. The CHANGELOG is ALREADY DONE by MPI-327 (single RELEASE_NOTES['1.1.0'] + archival 2026-07-09-v1.1.0.md + UNRELEASED cleared; 1.2.0 stub notes/archival/.approved-1.2.0.json deleted) — do NOT rebuild it. You still owe the version-constant rename: appVersion.js/package.json/package-lock.json APP_VERSION -> 1.1.0; operationRegistry.js + operation_registry.json appVersionIntroduced 1.2.0 -> 1.1.0 for 9 ops; npm run release:approve (fresh .approved-1.1.0.json); npm run release:check green. Full step list: .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/MPI-327/validation.md. Then promote branch 1.2.0 -> master AS 1.1.0 (mpi-merge-branches) or mpi-release-public. release:check is RED right now until you bump APP_VERSION — expected.

Session close-out (/mpi-end) after the fix + remaining validation.

next_action.description: Priority = get 1.2 release-ready. MPI-326 (the remote-only re-render storm making the op dropdown + sliders unusable on remote) is ROOT-VERIFIED and the A+B fix is already IMPLEMENTED this session (uncommitted, verified by node --check + full caller sweep). Remaining for MPI-326 = VERIFY on a Pod (dropdown stays open + sliders drag on remote + Pod log no longer POSTs /wrapper/models/status every ~5s), then move it to done + commit js/shell.js + js/data/modelRegistry.js. Then finish MPI-300 (Qwen-Edit + untested 3rd-image chip) and MPI-310 (inverse-GC first, uninstall dead-last) on the same cheap Pod reconnect on volume 9t3awufudk. (dev_configs/node_lock.json is already committed in ab421bb7 — no action.) Then run the release flow — SEE the VERSION CHANGE note in key_decisions + plan.pending: the public target is now 1.1.0 (not 1.2.0), the changelog is already done by peer session MPI-327, and you owe the version-constant rename per .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/MPI-327/validation.md.

key_decisions: VERSION RENAME (peer session MPI-327, 2026-07-21): the public release target changed 1.2.0 -> 1.1.0. The internal 1.1.0 + 1.1.1 never shipped publicly, so this dev branch (internally '1.2.0') becomes the public 1.1.0. MPI-327 already rebuilt the CHANGELOG for it: one aggregated RELEASE_NOTES['1.1.0'], archival 2026-07-09-v1.1.0.md, UNRELEASED cleared, and the 1.2.0 stub notes/archival/.approved-1.2.0.json deleted. Remaining for the release flow = the version-constant rename (appVersion/package/lock APP_VERSION -> 1.1.0 + op-registry appVersionIntroduced 1.2.0 -> 1.1.0 for 9 ops in BOTH operationRegistry.js and operation_registry.json + npm run release:approve + npm run release:check green). Full list in .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/MPI-327/validation.md. release:check stays RED until APP_VERSION is bumped — expected mid-flight, not a regression.

MPI-309 box nodes are remote-proven; dev_configs/node_lock.json (MpiNodes aaa1d2d) was ALREADY committed pre-session in ab421bb7 (git-verified not dirty) — the prior handoff's 'UNCOMMITTED' claim was stale.
Head Swap (MPI-299/306) is NOT a 1.2 release gate — apps stay dev-only in 1.2; apps may ship in 1.3/1.4. Its remote gen passed anyway (Hyper tier).

MPI-326 is remote-only (deleting the Pod / running local = clean) and steady-state (survives clean restart+reconnect), so it is a genuine design bug in the remote polling layer, not a connect-flap artifact. Severity leans 1.2-blocker because the slider corruption makes controls unusable on remote. User chose to decide 1.2-vs-1.3 next session.

Restart pod-lifecycle observation (UNCARDED): on app restart the auto-connect-on-start tears down the warm Pod and issues a fresh create, logging a NEW pod id + orphan-sweeping the old — but a <20s time-to-connected proves it reattached warm resources on the same volume, so the 'created new pod' logging is misleading. Neighbour of project_reconnect_deletes_warm_pod. Offer to card next session.
constraints: A local-engine pass proves NOTHING about the remote path (feedback_runpod_not_local_engine_proof) — everything here except MPI-309/282 is still remote-unproven.

MPI-326 fix touches shared render/poll machinery — brief the user before patching (release week, same rule that deferred MPI-320). Root-fix candidate = source-diff the models:checked emit at modelRegistry.js:218 so redundant remote syncs stay silent + stop/throttle the steady-state remote poll; SWEEP all models:checked consumers (shell.js s_installedModelIds, heroStats, MpiModelManager, MpiAppLibrary, MpiGalleryBlock, MpiPromptBox) so nothing half-wires.

Slider snap-back means _refreshOpSlot is rebuilding (models:checked only calls _refreshOpDropdown) — the true trigger is likely a full PromptBox remount by a parent Block reacting to a polled state write; confirm from the trace before coding.
MPI-300: the 3rd-image chip (Input_Image_3) is untested ANYWHERE, not just remotely.

MPI-310 uninstall = 5.24GB refetch, do it DEAD LAST; do the inverse GC check (uninstall an unrelated model, describer stays Installed) FIRST. The describer plugin row shows 'Installing' this session (known display bug folded into MPI-320 for v1.3) — verify via the Describe action, not the row.
Volume 9t3awufudk keeps all sweep weights; a new Pod reconnect is cheap (~10 min, no re-download).
